title: Misheard music game，grab the mic game Music Party Game for 2-10 Players, Music Card Games with 125 Cards for Family and Adult Christmas & Birthday Gifts
features: "Fast-Paced Lyric Challenge Experience the thrill of the Grab the Mic Game! Flip a card, spot the word, and be the first to grab the microphone and sing any lyric containing it. This rapid-fire lyrically correct game​ guarantees non-stop action and excitement for all players, testing their musical knowledge under pressure."

"Hilarious Misheard Music Moments Prepare for uncontrollable laughter with this ultimate misheard music game! As friends race against the clock, expect side-splitting, off-key renditions and hilarious lyrical mix-ups. It creates more memorable and funny moments than any typical party game, making every round uniquely entertaining."

"Dynamic & Reversible Gameplay Flip the reversible game board to unlock advanced modes like 'Solo Showdown' or 'Full Volume' challenges. Use the exclusive Mute Token to silence opponents, adding a strategic press-your-luck​ twist. This innovative design, loved in the Grab the Mic Game UK, ensures no two parties are ever the same."

"Perfect Party Game for Everyone As the ideal Grab the Mic Game​ for families and friends, it’s designed for players aged 8 and up. It effortlessly bridges generations, creating a fun and energetic atmosphere at any gathering, from family game nights to adult parties, ensuring everyone can join in the musical madness."

"Endless Replayability Included Enjoy limitless fun with 125 diverse word cards, a premium foam microphone, and variable rules. This complete missheard music game​ kit offers more lasting entertainment and replay value than single-round games, guaranteeing that every session is a fresh and exciting challenge."
description: Product description Experience the hilarious and fast-paced party game that has everyone talking! This is the must-have Grab the Mic Game UK​ and beyond, a thrilling singing challenge perfect for any gathering. It's more than just a lyrically correct game; it's an unforgettable misheard music game​ where players race to sing lyrics containing the target word, often leading to laugh-out-loud mistakes. Whether you're a music maestro or just love a good laugh, this missheard music game​ guarantees side-splitting fun. Get ready to grab the mic game​ night with endless replayability and create epic musical memories that will have everyone wanting an encore Directions 1. Shuffle the 125 cards and place them face down on the table. 2. Place the microphone in the center. 3. The youngest player goes first and flips a card. 4. Players race to sing any lyric containing the target word, with the first to grab the microphone and sing winning the round. 5. The game continues until all cards have been used. Safety Warning NO See more
